tasks.instruction: Open your draft auction listings, edit the first draft so its head count is 18, increase the per-head starting bid from its current value, move the closing date 3 days later while keeping the same closing time, append a brief note to the description, and save the draft.

tasks.instruction: Search for Angus bull auctions in Texas, compare the ages of the first two results, then use the site’s messaging tool to send an inquiry to the seller of whichever bull is younger saying: "I'm interested in this Angus bull.
